mathematical_policy.for_each_disease_node: posterior_odds_d = prior_odds_d * product(LR_e_for_d for observed evidence e)
mathematical_policy.ranking: allowed as sorting independent disease posteriors; not a probability simplex

candidate_set_policy.active_candidate_set: defines which disease nodes are evaluated
candidate_set_policy.adding_new_diseases: append disease node and likelihood rows without renormalizing existing disease posteriors
candidate_set_policy.coactivation_interpretation: multiple high posteriors may represent overlap, comorbidity, mimicry, or insufficient discrimination

evidence_policy.finding_patterns: derived evidence patterns computed from raw observations
evidence_policy.disease_likelihoods: one-vs-rest likelihood parameters for each disease node
evidence_policy.criteria_audit: deterministic or semi-deterministic criteria support labels after evidence derivation
evidence_policy.posterior_audit: interpretation of competing or coactivated independent posteriors
evidence_policy.action_rules: safety and workflow recommendations; not posterior evidence

double_counting_policy.rule: If a derived finding pattern is used as diagnostic evidence, suppress its raw components from the same disease likelihood product.
